case_title: S JOHNSON STRICKLAND VS. LANA ROMLEY

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-03-2020 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-27-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2020 CONTINUED TO MAR-03-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRICKLAND, S JOHNSON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRICKLAND, S JOHNSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROMLEY, LANA AKA EVA LARSEL, LANA LARSELKA, LARSELKA, LANA YAROSLAVOVNA GUNN, PATRICK COOLEY LLP DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-27-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-23-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-04-2019

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF, S. JOHNSON STRICKLAND FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-14-2020, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-14-2020. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-14-2020 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-03-2020 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2020 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance or objection. Court orders case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Continued To Mar-03-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Mar-03-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court orders notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
